scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('public')) { fs.mkdirSync('public'); } fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/web-ifc/web-ifc.wasm', 'public/web-ifc.wasm'); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/@thatopen/fragments/dist/Worker/worker.mjs', 'public/worker.mjs');" && node scripts/patch-thatopen-keywords.mjs
